comments.post_body: Thrilled to announce that The Bellwethers are locked in to record with the amazing Andrew Coleman at the end Feb.   https://andrewcoleman.net #album3 #comingsoon #makingnoise #szrmusicgroup
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to an announcement about The Bellwethers recording with Andrew Coleman at the end of February. The post shared the exciting news and included a link to Andrew Coleman's website, generating buzz about the upcoming album.
